'''Ord Segra''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Ord Segra system/Legends|Ord Segra system]].

{{Planet-stub}}
